globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; script-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com; upgrade-insecure-requests
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
